SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2025 BY GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF EILEEN CRONIN APPEARED. DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MGMT APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL MARGADO, REGIONAL PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT SYNERGY ENTERPRISES INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY PETER LANDRE, VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MGMT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (504)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRONIN, EILEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MGMT SYNERGY ENTERPRISES INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
